name: ExtensionBiologicallyDerivedProductDispense_Product
title: R5: The BiologicallyDerivedProduct that is dispensed (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.product` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.product` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BiologicallyDerivedProduct)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.product` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BiologicallyDerivedProduct)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.product` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense` is not mapped.
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProductDispense.product` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The BiologicallyDerivedProduct that is dispensed (new)

element.definition: A link to a resource identifying the biologically derived product that is being dispensed.
